entries.original: Supported models can now request full-resolution image inspection through both `view_image` and `codex.emitImage(..., detail: "original")`, which helps with precision visual tasks. (#14175)
entries.translated: App-server: v2 filesystem API 추가

entries.original: `js_repl` now exposes `codex.cwd` and `codex.homeDir`, and saved `codex.tool(...)` / `codex.emitImage(...)` references keep working across cells. (#14385, #14503)
entries.translated: MCP 도구 이름을 code-mode에 안전한 형식으로 정규화

entries.original: Realtime websocket sessions gained a dedicated transcription mode, plus v2 handoff support through the `codex` tool, with a unified `[realtime]` session config. (#14554, #14556, #14606)
entries.translated: Core 테스트의 wait_agent 기대 결과 수정

entries.original: The v2 app-server now exposes filesystem RPCs for file reads, writes, copies, directory operations, and path watching, and there is a new Python SDK for integrating with that API. (#14245, #14435)
entries.translated: Core, app-server, TUI 전반에 Smart Approvals guardian 리뷰 추가

entries.original: Smart Approvals can now route review requests through a guardian subagent in core, app-server, and TUI, reducing repeated setup work on follow-up approvals. (#13860, #14668)
entries.translated: 오래된 create_wait_tool 참조 수정

entries.original: App integrations now use the Responses API tool-search flow, can suggest missing tools, and fall back cleanly when the active model does not support search-based lookup. (#14274, #14287, #14732)
entries.translated: [hooks] continuation 중지 및 stop_hook_active 메커니즘

entries.original: Spawned subagents now inherit sandbox and network rules more reliably, including project-profile layering, persisted host approvals, and symlinked writable roots. (#14619, #14650, #14674, #14807)
entries.translated: 실시간 트랜스크립션 session.update tools 페이로드 수정

entries.original: `js_repl` no longer hangs when dynamic tool responses contain literal U+2028 or U+2029 characters. (#14421)
entries.translated: 파서 전용 실시간 음성 enum 사용

entries.original: The TUI no longer stalls on exit after creating subagents, and interrupting a turn no longer tears down background terminals by default. (#14816, #14602)
entries.translated: Unified-exec zsh-fork 상태를 명시적으로 변경

entries.original: `codex exec --profile` once again preserves profile-scoped settings when starting or resuming a thread. (#14524)
entries.translated: 내장 프로바이더를 위한 openai_base_url 설정 재정의 추가

entries.original: MCP and elicitation flows are more robust, with safer tool-name normalization and preserved `tool_params` in approval prompts. (#14491, #14605, #14769)
entries.translated: Guardian 및 Smart Approvals에 대한 Windows CI 어설션 수정

entries.original: The local network proxy now serves CONNECT traffic as explicit HTTP/1, improving compatibility with HTTP proxy clients. (#14395)
entries.translated: 백트래킹 후 턴 컨텍스트 재구성 수정

entries.original: The subagent wait tool is now consistently named `wait_agent`, aligning it with `spawn_agent` and `send_input`. (#14631)
entries.translated: 세션 간 향후 네트워크 호스트 승인 유지

entries.original: #14395 fix(network-proxy): serve HTTP proxy listener as HTTP/1
entries.translated: 생성된 하위 에이전트에 대해 분할된 샌드박스 정책 동기화

entries.original: #14385 Add js_repl cwd and homeDir helpers
#14376 Keep agent-switch word-motion keys out of draft editing
entries.translated: 드래프트 편집 중 에이전트 전환 및 단어 이동 키 비활성화

entries.original: #14175 Let models opt into original image detail
entries.translated: 모델이 원본 이미지 디테일을 사용하도록 설정 허용

entries.original: #14382 check for large binaries in CI
entries.translated: CI에서 대용량 바이너리 확인 추가

entries.translated: `codex/event/` 알림 전송 중단

entries.translated: `search_tool`을 `Responses API`의 BYOT(Bring Your Own Tool)로 마이그레이션

entries.translated: 파일 시스템 권한 우선순위 중앙화
